falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the previous peak (before the 2024 bottom) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above key resistance would invalidate the bottom pattern and suggest a bullish reversal, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 (current score: 42) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme overbought conditions, suggesting a potential top rather than a bottom, directly contradicting the current pattern match.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average crosses below the 50-day moving average (death cross) with volume > 200% of the 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A death cross with explosive volume confirms a bearish trend, invalidating the HOLD signal and suggesting a sustained downtrend rather than a bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
